languages.text: РТ создает организацию исследователей, они составляют карты маршрутов в самые труднодоступные места для поиска полезных ресурсов.

traits.locale_text: РТ создает организацию исследователей, они составляют карты маршрутов в самые труднодоступные места для поиска полезных ресурсов.

languages.text: Среди разведчиков 32-го полка отыщут смельчаков для набора в специальный разведкорпус "Тени Заркова", чьим пожизненным долгом будет составление карт и поиски безопасных проходов на нижние уровни планеты.

traits.locale_text: Организованный из самых опытных солдат отряд исследователей спустится на нижние уровни Заркова. Составленные разведкорпусом карты облегчат грядущую экспансию Империума.

languages.text: From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.
languages.original_text: Среди разведчиков 32-го полка отыщут смельчаков для набора в специальный разведкорпус "Тени Заркова", чьим пожизненным долгом будет составление карт и поиски безопасных проходов на нижние уровни планеты.

traits.locale_text: Among the scouts of the 32nd Regiment daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.

From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.

languages.text: Una serie de voluntarios elegidos entre los exploradores del 32.º regimiento formarán un cuerpo especializado, las «Sombras de Zarkov». Su deber vitalicio será trazar mapas y buscar rutas seguras a los niveles inferiores del planeta.
languages.original_text: From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.

traits.locale_text: Una serie de voluntarios elegidos entre los exploradores del 32.º regimiento formarán un cuerpo especializado, las «Sombras de Zarkov». Su deber vitalicio será trazar mapas y buscar rutas seguras a los niveles inferiores del planeta.

languages.text: 从第32团的侦察兵中，招募一批勇敢无畏的志愿者，组建成特种侦察部队“扎尔科夫暗影”。他们将终身肩负绘制地图、寻找通往行星下层安全路线的职责。
languages.original_text: From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.

traits.locale_text: 从第32团的侦察兵中，招募一批勇敢无畏的志愿者，组建成特种侦察部队“扎尔科夫暗影”。他们将终身肩负绘制地图、寻找通往行星下层安全路线的职责。

languages.text: Des volontaires seront recrutés parmi les éclaireurs du 32e régiment pour rejoindre un corps de reconnaissance spécialisé surnommé les « Ombres de Zarkov ». Ils consacreront leur vie à dresser des cartes et à rechercher des passages sûrs vers les niveaux inférieurs de la planète.
languages.original_text: From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.

traits.locale_text: Des volontaires seront recrutés parmi les éclaireurs du 32e régiment pour rejoindre un corps de reconnaissance spécialisé surnommé les « Ombres de Zarkov ». Ils consacreront leur vie à dresser des cartes et à rechercher des passages sûrs vers les niveaux inférieurs de la planète.

languages.text: 32. Alay'ın izcileri arasındaki cesur gönüllüler "Zarkov'un Gölgeleri" olarak bilinen özel bir keşif birliğine alınacak. Hayatları boyunca haritalar çıkarma ve gezegenin alt seviyelerine güvenli geçişler arama görevini üstlenecekler.
languages.original_text: From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.

traits.locale_text: 32. Alay'ın izcileri arasındaki cesur gönüllüler "Zarkov'un Gölgeleri" olarak bilinen özel bir keşif birliğine alınacak. Hayatları boyunca haritalar çıkarma ve gezegenin alt seviyelerine güvenli geçişler arama görevini üstlenecekler.

languages.text: 32連隊の偵察隊から、勇敢な志願者を「ザルコフの影」と呼ばれる特殊偵察隊に募集する。彼らは生涯にわたって、惑星の地下への安全な通路を地図に描き、探す義務を負う。
languages.original_text: From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.

traits.locale_text: 32連隊の偵察隊から、勇敢な志願者を「ザルコフの影」と呼ばれる特殊偵察隊に募集する。彼らは生涯にわたって、惑星の地下への安全な通路を地図に描き、探す義務を負う。

languages.text: Aus den Reihen der Späher des 32. Regiments werden mutige Freiwillige für ein spezialisiertes Aufklärungskorps namens 'Schatten von Zarkov' rekrutiert. Sie haben die lebenslange Pflicht, Karten zu erstellen und sichere Wege in die tieferen Bereiche des Planeten zu suchen.
languages.original_text: From the scouts of the 32nd Regiment, daring volunteers shall be recruited into a specialised reconnaissance corps known as the "Shadows of Zarkov." They shall bear the lifelong duty of charting maps and searching for safe passages to the planet's lower levels.

traits.locale_text: Aus den Reihen der Späher des 32. Regiments werden mutige Freiwillige für ein spezialisiertes Aufklärungskorps namens 'Schatten von Zarkov' rekrutiert. Sie haben die lebenslange Pflicht, Karten zu erstellen und sichere Wege in die tieferen Bereiche des Planeten zu suchen.
